lyrics.text: I'll admit I was wrong
lyrics.translation: 我承认都是我的错

lyrics.text: What else can I say girl
lyrics.translation: 宝贝我还能说些什么

lyrics.text: Can't you blame my head and not my heart
lyrics.translation: 你能不能别对我身心指责

lyrics.text: I was drunk I was gone
lyrics.translation: 我宿醉 一去不回

lyrics.text: That don't make it right but
lyrics.translation: 也没让一切回到正轨

lyrics.text: Promise there were no feelings involved
lyrics.translation: 但我保证这一切都跟感情无关联

lyrics.text: She said boy tell me honestly
lyrics.translation: 她说 宝贝你就坦白告诉我

lyrics.text: Was it real or just for show
lyrics.translation: 这一切是真心还是你的逢场作戏

lyrics.text: She said save your apologies
lyrics.translation: 她说 不如就省省你的歉意和愧疚

lyrics.text: Baby I just got to know
lyrics.translation: 我只要知道事实就足够

lyrics.text: How long has this been goin' on
lyrics.translation: 这样的情形持续了多久

lyrics.text: You've been creepin' round on me
lyrics.translation: 你一边背着我偷腥偷摸

lyrics.text: While you're calling me baby
lyrics.translation: 一边却还在叫我亲爱的

lyrics.text: How long has this been goin' on
lyrics.translation: 噢这样的情形到底多久了

lyrics.text: You've been acting so shady
lyrics.translation: 你的所作所为阴暗难琢磨

lyrics.text: I've been feeling it lately baby
lyrics.translation: 我最近却才有所察觉呢

lyrics.text: I'll admit it's my fault
lyrics.translation: 我承认这都是我的错

lyrics.text: But you gotta believe me
lyrics.translation: 但你必须相信我

lyrics.text: When I say it only happened once
lyrics.translation: 当我说一切再无下次的时候

lyrics.text: I try and I try but you'll never see that
lyrics.translation: 我不停尝试努力但你却从未看清

lyrics.text: You're the only one I wanna love
lyrics.translation: 你就是我最想要去爱的唯一

lyrics.text: She said boy tell me honestly
lyrics.translation: 她说 亲爱的就老实告诉我

lyrics.translation: 我最近却才有所察觉呢

lyrics.text: How long has this been goin' on baby
lyrics.translation: 噢这样的情形到底多久了宝贝

lyrics.text: You gonna go tell me now
lyrics.translation: 你最好现在就坦白对我说
